title: ilex corallina
intro: Ilex corallina, also known as the holly tree, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia, characterized by its prickly leaves and bright red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its leaves and berries possessing medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex corallina include its ability to help lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Ilex corallina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
